text: Which city is the capital of Ethiopia?
explanation: Addis Ababa has been the capital of Ethiopia since it was founded by Emperor Menelik II in 1886.

text: The Battle of Adwa took place in 1896.
explanation: The Battle of Adwa was fought on March 1 1896 where Ethiopia defeated the Italian army and remained independent.

text: The ancient kingdom that preceded the Aksumite Empire was known as ___.
explanation: The Damt kingdom was one of the earliest states in the Ethiopian region before the rise of Aksum.

text: Briefly explain the significance of the Battle of Adwa for Africa.
answer: The Battle of Adwa was significant because it was the first time an African nation defeated a European colonial power inspiring independence movements across Africa.
explanation: Look for: defeat of Italian forces, Ethiopian independence preserved, inspiration for pan-Africanism.

text: Who was the Emperor of Ethiopia during the Battle of Adwa?
explanation: Emperor Menelik II led Ethiopian forces to victory at the Battle of Adwa in 1896.
